name: Bernaise Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry white wine or vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vinegar, wine, shallots, and tarragon in a 2-cup glass measure.
2. Microwave uncovered at high for 1 to 2 minutes or until boiling. Set aside to cool to lukewarm.
3. Strain the mixture into a small bowl; whisk in the egg yolks.
4. In the 2-cup glass measure or similar microwaveable bowl, melt the butter at medium for 40 to 60 seconds. Do not boil.
5. Whisk the egg yolk mixture into the butter.
6. Microwave uncovered at medium for 30 to 90 seconds, whisking every 15 seconds until the mixture starts to thicken.
7. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
